label: graph, type
constraint: The data is represented as a networkx graph made up of cloud resource graph in Azure network.

label: node, name
constraint: node 'name' is a string depending on its 'type'.

label: node, properties, virtualmachines
constraint: when 'type'=='virtualmachines', 'properties' has 'osType', 'Networkinterfaces'. when 'type'=='Networkinterfaces', 'properties' has 'virtualnetworks', 'Networkinterfaces'. when 'type'=='virtualnetworks', 'properties' has 'provisioningState', 'addressPrefixes', 'port'. when 'type'=='networksecuritygroups', 'properties' has 'protocol', 'addressPrefixes', 'port', 'priority'.

label: node, properties, Networkinterfaces
constraint: when 'type'=='Networkinterfaces', 'properties' has 'virtualnetworks', 'Networkinterfaces'. when 'type'=='virtualnetworks', 'properties' has 'provisioningState', 'addressPrefixes', 'port'. when 'type'=='networksecuritygroups', 'properties' has 'protocol', 'addressPrefixes', 'port', 'priority'.

label: edge, virtualmachines, Networkinterfaces
constraint: 'virtualmachines' type node can be connected to 'Networkinterfaces' type node if they have the same value for 'Networkinterfaces' in properties.

label: edge, Networkinterfaces, virtualnetworks
constraint: 'Networkinterfaces' type node can be connected to  'virtualnetworks' type node if they have the same value for 'addressPrefixes' in properties.

label: edge, virtualnetworks, networksecuritygroups
constraint: 'virtualnetworks' type node can be connected to  'networksecuritygroups' type node if they have the same value for 'addressPrefixes' and 'port' in properties.

label: node, VM
constraint: VM node refers to 'virtualmachines' type node in the graph.

label: node, network interfaces
constraint: network interfaces node refers to 'Networkinterfaces' type node in the graph.

label: node, virtual networks
constraint: virtual networks node refers to 'virtualnetworks' type node in the graph.

label: node, network security groups
constraint: network security groups node refers to 'networksecuritygroups' type node in the graph.

label: inbound, traffic
constraint: When checking inbound traffic, you need to check if 'InBound' is contained as part of node's 'name'.
